Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Notice of Depositions Of Plaintiffs John Williams and Ruth Rubio is denied as it seeks to compel the depositions prior to the completion of Defendant's production of documents. John G. Cowperthwaite, for defendant/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Plaintiffs' Request For Production of Documents is ordered off calendar as the motion was not timely noticed and served. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
